_doc: Live forward paper-trade tracker. Populated/updated by scripts/paper-trade-update.ts (run via the monthly routine). Each entry records entry date, ticker, sector, headline-filter status, and gets marked-to-market over time. After 12 months a trade closes and realized P&L is recorded.
